title: HeartbeatPayload v1
description: At-most-once liveness ping; wrapped in NatsEnvelope with ordering metadata on the wire. Sourced from src/custos/core/nats_client.py:104-132 (build_heartbeat_envelope). runner_id is inside the payload (not just the subject) so a stray envelope with a wrong subject is still self-identifying.

runner_id.description: Runner identity; MUST match the connected runner (arx-side tenancy guard).

uptime_secs.description: Seconds since daemon start; monotonic within one process.

health.description: Aggregate self-assessment (`degraded` if any deployment is degraded or the reconcile loop is retrying; `unhealthy` if vault locked / arx unreachable AND local breaker tripped).
